name: Buttermilk Pancakes -Gwhp32a
recipeInstructions: MAKES 16 TO 18 CAKES SIFT flour with salt and baking soda. Beat the egg, add buttermilk and butter. Stir until ingredients are combined, but batter remains lumpy. Grease a griddle lightly. Pour batter onto the griddle, cooking once on each side until browned. Turn cakes once to cook both sides.
